app.title: 🍀 Lotto Number Predictor
ranking.title: Today's MBTI Luck Ranking
fortune.title: Today's Lucky Numbers
tab.name: Name
frequent.desc: Selects 6 from the top 15 most frequently drawn numbers.
rare.desc: Selects 6 from the 15 least frequently drawn numbers.
saju.desc:
Generates numbers based on your birth date using Eastern Astrology (Four Pillars of Destiny).
Same birth date always gives the same numbers.
name.desc:
Analyzes your name's numerology and Five Elements energy to generate numbers.
Same name always gives the same numbers.
mbti.desc:
Generates today's lucky numbers based on your MBTI personality.
Same MBTI gives different numbers each day.
chem.desc:
Check your lotto compatibility and generate shared lucky numbers!
Same name pair gives the same result on the same day.
